response:
text  
highlighted section  
the total time it takes for Alex to complete the hike is calculated by finding the value of t where v(t) = 4 + 0.5t equals the average speed, which is given as v. solving 4 + 0.5t = v gives t = (v - 4) / 0.5. the total time for the hike is t.  
highlighted section  
the total time it takes for Alex to kayak across to the island is calculated by finding the value of t where k(t) = 6 + 2 sin(πt/3) equals the average speed, which is given as k. solving 6 + 2 sin(πt/3) = k gives t = (k - 6) / (2 sin(πt/3)). the total time for the kayak is t.
